prompt: Create a highly detailed European Renaissance oil painting inspired by Raphael, showing an adult woman bathing in an opulent classical marble bath, viewed from behind in a three-quarter pose. She has very long wavy golden blonde hair cascading down her back, one hand lifting a lock of hair and the other holding a translucent white drapery cloth. Her skin is softly luminous and wet, with tasteful classical modesty using sheer fabric wrapped around the waist and chest; the scene should feel like an antique mythological bathing portrait rather than modern glamour. Add a plain rectangular censor block over the face in a muted tan color, centered where the face would be visible. The setting is a grand Renaissance palace bath with carved marble, ornate gilded mirror frame on the left, tall columns, decorative stained-glass window on the right, turquoise water in the foreground, steam and mist rising around the figure, and warm diagonal sunbeams entering from above. Use rich chiaroscuro lighting, soft painterly brushwork, creamy skin tones, golden highlights, realistic water reflections, delicate fabric folds, and a museum-quality classical composition. No text, no watermark, vertical portrait composition, elegant fine-art atmosphere.
